Hello, I am Juita
JS

Strategic Partnership Professional with a commercial background.

I work with SaaS and technology companies to build and grow partner ecosystems across international markets.

Before moving into SaaS partnerships, I spent nearly a decade in procurement and commercial roles across several industries. That experience strengthened my approach to stakeholder management, commercial negotiations, and building long-term business relationships, skills that continue to shape how I work with partners today.

Expertise

Areas where I create value.

01. Partner Strategy

Design and execute partnership strategies that create sustainable business growth.

02. Partner Acquisition

Identify, recruit, and onboard partners that complement the company's products and market objectives.

03. Partner Success

Enable partners with the right resources, training, and support to maximize long-term performance.

04. Revenue Partnerships

Collaborate with partners to build pipeline, close opportunities, and increase recurring revenue.

05. Global Partner Management

Manage cross-regional partner relationships across Southeast Asia, Europe, the Middle East, Latin America, and Africa.

Background

Career Journey.

I began my career in procurement, managing supplier relationships, commercial negotiations, and cross-functional stakeholders across multiple industries. That experience gave me a strong commercial foundation before transitioning into SaaS and technology partnerships, where I've spent the past six years building partner ecosystems, enabling partners, and driving revenue growth..
